tasks.title: Set Up Morning Brief Cron
tasks.description: Configure OpenClaw cron to fire at 8am weekdays and post daily brief to #daily-brief channel. Includes: weather, calendar, top 3 tasks, urgent emails.

tasks.title: Integrate Email (Gmail/Outlook)
tasks.description: Set up gog CLI or equivalent so COO can check inbox during heartbeats. OAuth required. Evaluate privacy tradeoffs first.
tasks.notes: Nice to have — heartbeats work without it.

tasks.title: 🚀 Launch MVP
tasks.description: Get product in front of first 10 users. Core loop must work. Don't wait for perfect — ship when it's good enough to learn from.

tasks.title: 📋 Weekly Review System
tasks.description: Establish a weekly review ritual: what shipped, what blocked, top 3 priorities for next week. COO to prompt every Friday at 5pm.

tasks.title: Customize SOUL.md
tasks.description: Replace all [CUSTOMIZE THIS] placeholders with your actual preferences. This defines your COO's personality — don't skip it.
tasks.reviewNotes: Draft done. Check tone feels right before marking complete.

tasks.title: ✅ Install the-coo Skill
tasks.description: Ran install-coo.sh, files copied to workspace, memory directory created.

task.title: string — emoji prefix optional, keep it short
task.description: string — what, why, and current status
task.owner: string — who is responsible (you, COO, or a person's name)
blockers: array of strings — what's in the way
task.successCriteria: string — how you'll know this is actually done
